title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
summary: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

title: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI are backing an effort to stop respiratory infections
summary: The common cold comes for us all—often more than once a year. And there is no way to prevent it. The best you can do is take vitamin C and stay away from people with the sniffles. Now the payment company Stripe, founded by brothers Patrick and John Collison, says it will fund...

title: Centene adds JPMorgan veteran to board
summary: Incoming board member Lauren Tyler has more than 30 years of leadership experience in the finance world, which could help Centene navigate the challenging operating environment facing insurers.
